name: 议长·橘猫
note: char_gicho uses frame animation (not DragonBones) per art-asset-inventory.json animation_method=frame_animation. Cat character uses simpler part set: head, ears, torso, tail. 192x192px compact canvas.

animations.description: Sitting cat. Subtle breathing: chest rises slightly f02, tail tip curls f03. Eyes half-closed, dignified. Loop seamless.
animations.image_prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor animation frame. 议长·橘猫 (Chairman orange tabby cat), dignified sitting pose, 192x192px canvas. {FRAME_DESCRIPTION}. Warm pastel watercolor chibi style, signature color deep navy #2A3650 on collar/marking. Transparent background. No text.

animations.description: Cat narrows eyes contentedly, tail rises and curls in half-circle. f01 neutral, f02 eyes narrowing, f03 full happy squint + tail up, f04 settle back.
animations.image_prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor animation frame. 议长·橘猫 happy expression, {FRAME_DESCRIPTION}. 192x192px. Same style as idle.

animations.description: Cat ears perk straight up, eyes go wide. f01 neutral, f02 ears fully alert + eyes wide, f03 settle. Quick readability.
animations.image_prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor animation frame. 议长·橘猫 surprised expression, {FRAME_DESCRIPTION}. 192x192px. Same style.

animations.description: Cat raises one paw in greeting gesture. f01 neutral, f02 paw raises, f03 paw at peak, f04 paw lowers. Dignified, not frantic.
animations.image_prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor animation frame. 议长·橘猫 greeting paw wave, {FRAME_DESCRIPTION}. 192x192px. Same style.
